'''Kimber''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|human]] settler who was living on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Battle of Fort Nowhere|devastated]] [[Fort Nowhere]]. Kimber with other survivors and hid in an [[Unidentified Ruusan temple|ancient temple]] under [[Grif Grawley]]. Not long after, an [[Moldy Crow/Legends|unknown ship]], following the directions transmitted by Grif, reached the temple courtyard; Kimber, along with [[Lasko]] and [[Luther Pardy]] were standing armed beside Grif as he welcomed the pilots, one of whom was an old acquaintance from [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]], [[Kyle Katarn]], and took their weapons. The three of them were ordered by Grif to cover the newly arrived ship with a netting in order to hide it from Imperial observations, and hide into the temple.<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

He helped [[Kyle Katarn]] to reach the [[Valley of the Jedi]].
